customer_comment: I switched from Dropbox to Google Drive last year and honestly the integration with Slack has been seamless.
Your support team is way more responsive than what I dealt with at Comcast. Keep it up.
The export feature keeps crashing when I try to send reports to Salesforce.
No complaints really, everything just works.
We evaluated Notion, Asana, and Monday.com before landing on your product. The Trello import saved us a week of setup.
Pricing feels steep compared to Zoho, but the Microsoft Teams plugin is why we stay.
